title: Bridge Essay: The Role of Heart Rate Variability in Mindfulness-Based Pain Relief.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Breath/Soul** (Phase 2) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Breath/Soul to mechanistic neuroscience.

**The Role of Heart Rate Variability in Mindfulness-Based Pain Relief.** — J Pain. PMID: 31377215. DOI: 10.1016/j.jpain.2019.07.003. Mindfulness meditation is aself-regulatory practice premised on sustaining nonreactive awareness of arising sensory events that reliably reduces pain. Yet, the specific analgesic mechanisms supporting mindfulness have not been comprehensively disentangled from the potential nonspecific factors supporting this technique. Increased parasympathetic nervous system (PNS) activity is associated with pain relief corresponding to anumber of cognitive manipulations. However, the relationship between th
